title: Beacons - pre emulation of social cortex
description: primitive emulation of social cortex currently only about tagging object types and labeled objects in simulations and having them refer to a table of  category and response, which might include a sim of their own sensitive to cues such as mood or transferable cues of  when the object type is called; then "emulated" in the mind a pulse-to-response only version of the associated objects for this purpose ( should update with more social cortex posits soon )
